basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: NIT Calicut is recruiting 1 post of Junior Research Fellow. Interview Date: 20 July 2026 (Offline).

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: Maximum 35 years | other requirements: Candidates in employment must submit NOC from employer
qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech in Electrical and Electronics Engineering with valid GATE/NET score

vacancy_details.details: Total 01 vacancy for Junior Research Fellow under the CPRI project.

selection_process: Shortlisted candidates will be called for Offline Interview on 20 July 2026. Final selection is based on interview performance and document verification.
how_to_apply: Fill the registration form (as annexed in the notification).
Prepare a single PDF containing: Duly filled registration form Most recent CV Soft copies of mark sheets / certificates
Soft copies of mark sheets / certificates
Email the PDF to [email protected] with a copy to [email protected].
Mention the subject line: “Application for Junior Research Fellow”.
Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email for the offline interview.
important_instructions: The engagement is purely on contract basis for 9 months. The Institute reserves the right to relax qualifications for exceptional candidates. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The applicant is responsible for the authenticity of all submitted documents. Selected candidate may be required to register for Ph.D. as per institute norms.

content_sections.heading: National Institute of Technology Calicut JRF Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: National Institute of Technology Calicut (NITC) invites applications for the post of Junior Research Fellow for the project titled “Development of AI-Powered Diagnostic Methods for Three-Phase Power Transformers Utilizing SFRA (Sweep Frequency Response Analysis)”. Download National Institute of Technology Calicut JRF Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply forNIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Fill the registration form (as annexed in the notification). Prepare a single PDF containing: Duly filled registration form Most recent CV Soft copies of mark sheets / certificates Email the PDF to [email protected] with a copy to [email protected] . Mention the subject line: “Application for Junior Research Fellow”. Last date: 14 July 2026. Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email for the offline interview.

No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The applicant is responsible for the authenticity of all submitted documents. faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Calicut JRF 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for application submission is 14 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Junior Research Fellow at NIT Calicut?
faq.answer: Rs. 37,000 + 20% HRA per month.

faq.question: Q3. What qualifications are required for NIT Calicut JRF position?
faq.answer: B.Tech in Electrical and Electronics Engineering with valid GATE/NET score. M.Tech is desirable.

faq.question: Q4. When is the interview for NIT Calicut JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The offline interview is scheduled on 20 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Send a single PDF with registration form, CV, and certificates to [email protected] with proper subject line.

faq.question: Q6. Is GATE score mandatory for NIT Calicut JRF 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, valid GATE/NET score is essential for B.Tech candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the duration of the JRF project at NIT Calicut?
faq.answer: The initial duration of engagement is 9 months.

faq.question: Q8. Is M.Tech required for NIT Calicut JRF position?
faq.answer: M.Tech is desirable but B.Tech with GATE/NET is the essential qualification.

faq.question: Q9. Will NIT Calicut provide any accommodation to JRF?
faq.answer: As per institute norms (not explicitly mentioned, subject to availability).

faq.question: Q10. Is the NIT Calicut JRF position permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is a contractual position for 9 months under the CPRI project.
